raw_consumer_statement:
i filed a dispute with credit card company, CITI, on XX/XX/year> for a charge made on XX/XX/XXXX at planet fitness. 
The company, planet fitness, said a contract was signed and it was ligitimate. 

the credit card company which gave me a provisional credit, reversed the charge and charged me {$47.00} I feel that i am a victim of identity theft and feel that i do not have a leg to stand on. 
I believe that the credit card company sided with the merchant.
